title: Content Report
description: Player-submitted report targeting unsafe or infringing content (pack, scenario, hero, unit, AI-faction). Distinct from `report-bundle.schema.json` (peer-behavior). Persisted locally in `state.privacy.outboundReports[]` and dequeued by the future moderation backend (Plan 30). See `ugc-safety.md` and screen 75.

reportId.description: Local opaque identifier; xxh64 of (targetId, submittedAt, salt). Never user-visible.

contentHash.description: Hex digest of the offending pack's contentHash (first 16 hex chars) so the moderation backend can correlate to revocation entries.

notes.description: Free-text notes; sanitized via the `safeUserText` helper per `ugc-safety.md` § Text Sanitization Contract.

screenshotAssetId.description: Optional pack-relative asset ID pointing at a user-captured screenshot. No upload at v1.
